M0640_CU_GROOMING (M0640) Current Grooming Current grooming ability to tend to personal hygiene needs. 00 = Able to groom self unaided, with or without the use of assistive devices or adapted methods
01 = Grooming utensils must be placed within reach before able to complete grooming activities
02 = Someone must assist the patient to groom self
03 = Patient depends entirely
